'''鈭歷-m-th''' ('''kavamath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filmify|filmify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filmify|filmify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-m-th
|-
! Lemma
| kavamath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivamath|thivamath]] || [[word:jivamath|jivamath]] || [[word:shivamath|shivamath]] || [[word:kivamath|kivamath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvamath|thuthuvamath]] || [[word:jujuvamath|jujuvamath]] || [[word:shushuvamath|shushuvamath]] || [[word:kukuvamath|kukuvamath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvamath|thuvamath]] || [[word:juvamath|juvamath]] || [[word:shuvamath|shuvamath]] || [[word:kuvamath|kuvamath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvamath|thuvamath]] || [[word:juvamath|juvamath]] || [[word:shuvamath|shuvamath]] || [[word:kuvamath|kuvamath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevamath|thevamath]] || [[word:jevamath|jevamath]] || [[word:shevamath|shevamath]] || [[word:kevamath|kevamath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovamath|thothovamath]] || [[word:jojovamath|jojovamath]] || [[word:shoshovamath|shoshovamath]] || [[word:kokovamath|kokovamath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovamath|thovamath]] || [[word:jovamath|jovamath]] || [[word:shovamath|shovamath]] || [[word:kovamath|kovamath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovamath|thovamath]] || [[word:jovamath|jovamath]] || [[word:shovamath|shovamath]] || [[word:kovamath|kovamath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vamath|th忙vamath]] || [[word:j忙vamath|j忙vamath]] || [[word:sh忙vamath|sh忙vamath]] || [[word:k忙vamath|k忙vamath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavamath|thathavamath]] || [[word:jajavamath|jajavamath]] || [[word:shashavamath|shashavamath]] || [[word:kakavamath|kakavamath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavamath|thavamath]] || [[word:javamath|javamath]] || [[word:shavamath|shavamath]] || [[word:kavamath|kavamath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavamath|thavamath]] || [[word:javamath|javamath]] || [[word:shavamath|shavamath]] || [[word:kavamath|kavamath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavamath|shavamath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavamath|goshavamath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavamath|gokishavamath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavamathn眉|shavamathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavamathnkn眉|goshavamathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamathn眉|gokishavamathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavamathsh毛|shavamathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavamathnksh毛|goshavamathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavamathsh毛|gokishavamathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamathro|shavamathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamathnkro|goshavamathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamathro|gokishavamathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamathmu|shavamathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamathnkmu|goshavamathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamathmu|gokishavamathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavamathsher|shavamathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavamathnksher|goshavamathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavamathsher|gokishavamathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavamathng|shavamathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavamathnkng|goshavamathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavamathng|gokishavamathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavamathya|shavamathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavamathnkya|goshavamathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavamathya|gokishavamathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavamathyam|shavamathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavamathnkyam|goshavamathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavamathyam|gokishavamathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamathn眉sh毛|shavamathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamathnkn眉sh毛|goshavamathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamathn眉sh毛|gokishavamathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamathn眉ro|shavamathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamathnkn眉ro|goshavamathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamathn眉ro|gokishavamathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamathn眉mu|shavamathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamathnkn眉mu|goshavamathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamathn眉mu|gokishavamathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamathsh毛n眉|shavamathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamathnksh毛n眉|goshavamathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamathsh毛n眉|gokishavamathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamathsh毛ro|shavamathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamathnksh毛ro|goshavamathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamathsh毛ro|gokishavamathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamathsh毛mu|shavamathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamathnksh毛mu|goshavamathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamathsh毛mu|gokishavamathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamathron眉|shavamathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamathnkron眉|goshavamathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamathron眉|gokishavamathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamathrosh毛|shavamathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamathnkrosh毛|goshavamathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamathrosh毛|gokishavamathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavamathromu|shavamathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavamathnkromu|goshavamathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavamathromu|gokishavamathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavamathmun眉|shavamathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavamathnkmun眉|goshavamathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavamathmun眉|gokishavamathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavamathmush毛|shavamathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavamathnkmush毛|goshavamathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavamathmush毛|gokishavamathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavamathmuro|shavamathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavamathnkmuro|goshavamathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavamathmuro|gokishavamathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
